label: Data quality assessment
definition: An assessment artifact describing confidence, uncertainty, and quality constraints for a salmon data product or metric.

label: Deme
definition: A local interbreeding group within a species; in salmon systems, typically corresponding to a spawning-site-scale biological unit.

label: Escapement
definition: The number of mature salmon that pass through (or escape) fisheries and return to fresh water to spawn.

label: Escapement measurement
definition: A measurement or estimate of escapement tied to a stock and a survey event.

label: Escapement survey event
definition: A survey event specifically for estimating escapement.

label: Event type
definition: A class used to categorize fisheries or survey event instances by operational type.

label: Exploitation rate
definition: The proportion of returning adult salmon removed by fishing activity over a defined period.

label: Indicator river
definition: A river or stream used as a relatively reliable abundance index for nearby salmon returns due to survey intensity and method quality.

label: Life phase scheme
definition: A concept scheme for life-phase terms.

label: Limit reference point
definition: A lower threshold indicating stock status where stronger mitigation or rebuilding action is triggered.

label: Lower biological benchmark
definition: Lower benchmark value used to delineate lower status boundaries for salmon assessment units.

label: Measurement
definition: A salmon-domain observation focused on one feature of interest and one characteristic.

label: Measurement context
definition: A context qualifier used to disambiguate interpretation of a measurement.

label: Measurement context scheme
definition: A concept scheme for measurement context terms such as catch context and run context.

label: Method documentation
definition: A documented method description linked to how a salmon metric or estimate was produced.

label: Metric benchmark
definition: Benchmark value for a metric used to delineate status categories.

label: Observed rate or abundance
definition: A measurement datum representing an empirically observed rate, count, or abundance derived from monitoring or survey data.

label: Population
definition: A group of organisms of the same species occupying a defined area that interbreed and share a gene pool.

label: Reference point
definition: A target or limit used to guide management actions.

label: Reporting or management stratum
definition: An information-defined grouping of fish populations used for reporting, conservation assessment, or management purposes across salmon programs.

label: Salmon origin scheme
definition: A concept scheme for salmon origin terms such as natural and hatchery origin.

label: Sampling event
definition: A sampling activity that targets a geographic feature, yields a sample, and records a time.

label: Stock
definition: An operationally defined grouping of salmon used for assessment and management purposes.

label: Stock assessment
definition: The scientific process of analyzing data to estimate abundance and productivity across time.

label: Survey event
definition: A field event that collects information about fish populations to evaluate status and support management decisions.

label: Target or limit rate or abundance
definition: A value specification representing a policy- or model-defined target or limit.

label: Total exploitation rate
definition: The overall proportion of returning adult salmon removed by all fisheries over a defined period.

label: Upper biological benchmark
definition: Upper benchmark value used to delineate higher status boundaries for salmon assessment units.

label: deme of
definition: Relates a deme to the population it belongs to.

label: has deme
definition: Relates a population to one of its constituent demes.

label: has feature of interest
definition: Relates a survey or observation event to the reporting or management stratum that is the focus of inference.

label: has observation result
definition: Relates a survey event to the measurement datum produced by that event.

label: has population
definition: Relates a reporting or management stratum to one of its constituent populations.

label: is sample of stratum
definition: Relates a sample to the reporting or management stratum it represents in analysis.

label: population of
definition: Relates a population to the reporting or management stratum it belongs to.

label: uses observation procedure
definition: Relates a survey event to the protocol or procedure used to conduct it.
